label: Solana watch read activity
description: Loads recent Solana Following watch events from storage (service worker). Saves JSON to a row variable: `{ activity, latest, count }`. Optional filters: watched address (substring match) and **sinceTimestampMs** (row `ts` in ms). Turn off **Apply client filters** to save the full list. Use **solanaWatchRefresh** first for a fresh poll. Pair with **watchActivityFilterTxAge**, **watchActivityFilterPriceDrift**, and swap steps. See docs/SOLANA_AUTOMATION.md.

formSchema.label: Apply address / timestamp filters in this step
Only rows with ts ≥ this (ms, optional)
